name: Customer_Status_Overview
SQL: CREATE VIEW Customer_Status_Overview AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.customer_status, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Customer_Info.age FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Customer_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id

name: Churn_Category_Retention_Risk
SQL: CREATE VIEW Churn_Category_Retention_Risk AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.churn_category, Payment_Info.contract, Status_Analysis.customer_status, Status_Analysis.churn_value FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Payment_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id

name: Service_Options_Ratio_Overview
SQL: CREATE VIEW Service_Options_Ratio_Overview AS SELECT Service_Options.customer_id, (Service_Options.avg_monthly_gb_download / NULLIF(Service_Options.tenure, 0)) AS CLTV_tenure_ratio, Service_Options.monthly_charges / Service_Options.avg_monthly_gb_download AS monthly_charges_gb_download_ratio, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Service_Options JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Demographic_Service_Patterns
SQL: CREATE VIEW Demographic_Service_Patterns AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.number_of_dependents, Payment_Info.contract, Status_Analysis.churn_score FROM Customer_Info JOIN Payment_Info ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Customer_Advocates_Churn_Risks
SQL: CREATE VIEW Customer_Advocates_Churn_Risks AS SELECT Service_Options.customer_id, Service_Options.number_of_referrals, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Service_Options JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Satisfaction_Trends_Over_Lifespan
SQL: CREATE VIEW Satisfaction_Trends_Over_Lifespan AS SELECT Service_Options.customer_id, Service_Options.tenure, AVG(Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score) AS avg_satisfaction_score, Payment_Info.monthly_charges, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Service_Options JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id JOIN Payment_Info ON Service_Options.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id
